items.description: Does the alerta section correctly have operador as an empty array at line 67?

context.why: Fase 4 requirement R3b: alerta.operador must be an array for future use by enviarAlertaDeFalha function

items.description: Does the manutencao section correctly have logsDiasReter as a number (30) at line 88?

context.why: Fase 4 requirement R8: manutencao.logsDiasReter must be a number for log retention policy in limparLogsAntigos

items.description: Is config.json valid JSON and does it maintain backward compatibility with no breaking changes to existing sections (clientes, filtro, agendamento, ibama, diariosEstaduais, painel)?

context.action: Verified JSON syntax and section integrity
context.why: Ensure config.json changes are additive only and do not break existing code that reads other sections

items.description: Are there any secret values (resendApiKey, senha, API keys) stored in config.json instead of config.local.json?

context.why: Security guardrail: secrets must never be stored in git-tracked config.json - they belong in config.local.json
